headline: 3 Reasons We Love Texas Pacific Land (TPL)
summary: Texas Pacific Land’s 31.8% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 21%, and its stock price has climbed to $397.13 per share. This run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
